events.title: Bitcoin in Healthcare w/ Dr. Noah Kaufman
events.speaker: Dr. Noah Kaufman
events.description: How do you build a modern medical practice on a Bitcoin standard? An evening with a Denver physician and Bitcoiner on integrating Bitcoin into corporate operations, decentralized healthcare, and sovereign money. Drinks + networking.

events.title: Denver BitDevs w/ Rob Warren
events.speaker: Rob Warren
events.description: Rob Warren (Head of Research & Education) on practical energy strategies for Bitcoin. Members social hour at 5pm, main event 6–8pm. Pizza provided. Expert-level.

events.title: Bitcoin, Beer & Live Art Auction
events.description: Bitcoin + beer social tuned into a live art auction on Scarce.city. Hang out, drink, and bid on Bitcoin art.
